prompt: Create a cinematic vertical bedroom scene, 9:16 aspect ratio, showing a life-size soccer superstar in Portugal’s red-and-green number 7 uniform bursting out of a giant comic-book poster in a teenager’s room. The poster is leaning against a graffiti-covered wall and reads “CRISTIANO RONALDO: Lenda Viva” in large retro comic lettering, with an old trading-card style strip on the left labeled “ABE” and “5022.” The player’s face should be intentionally obscured with a soft square blur, while his body is sharply rendered in dynamic mid-run pose, one hand raised, dramatic golden backlight exploding from the torn poster opening. The poster art contains exactly 6 visible comic panels: a Portugal flag panel, a stadium panel, a pitch panel, a crowd/stadium panel, a red-and-green abstract soccer panel, and a lower action/comic panel; add flying torn paper shards around the figure. The room should feel like a messy fan bedroom at dusk with warm string lights along the ceiling, moody blue-orange lighting, graffiti tags on the walls, and sports memorabilia everywhere. Include exactly 5 wall posters outside the giant comic poster: one soccer player poster on the left wall, one soccer player poster above the dresser, one black-and-white band poster reading “BAND BAN” on the right wall, one smaller soccer action poster, and one Portugal flag poster. Include exactly 3 game controllers on the floor, 1 smartphone showing a soccer-themed image, 1 gold trophy cup and 1 smaller gold trophy on the dresser, 1 desk lamp glowing on the left desk, 2 beds or low sleeping areas with rumpled blankets, 1 pair of red sneakers near the right bed, and scattered Portugal jerseys and clothing on the wooden floor. Style: highly detailed 3D digital illustration with photorealistic room lighting, comic-book poster graphics, saturated reds and greens, dramatic volumetric glow, cozy clutter, realistic fabric folds, sharp depth of field, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond the specified poster lettering. Use CRISTIANO RONALDO, Lenda Viva, Portugal red and green, teenage soccer fan bedroom, and retro comic-book superhero sports poster.
